headline: 80-year-old discount grocery chain closes 36 stores
summary: Within three miles of my house, I have two Publix stores, an Aldi, a Fresh Market, a Target with a full grocery section, a Walmart, and a BJ's Wholesale under construction. There's a Sprouts a little further away, as well as multiple Dollar General locations and a locally owned farmer's ...
